items.title: Where can AI be used? Insights from a deep ontology of work activities
items.authors: Alice Cai and Iman YeckehZaare and Shuo Sun and Vasiliki Charisi and Xinru Wang and Aiman Imran and Robert Laubacher and Alok Prakash and Thomas Malone
items.authorsShort: A. Cai, I. YeckehZaare, S. Sun, V. Charisi, X. Wang, et al.
items.summary: A current-facing paper that reflects the move toward understanding where AI can productively augment human work through a structured ontology of activities.

items.title: RMP-YOLO: A Robust Motion Predictor for Partially Observable Scenarios even if You Only Look Once
items.authors: Jiawei Sun and Jiahui Li and Tingchen Liu and Chengran Yuan and Shuo Sun and Zefan Huang and Anthony Wong and Keng Peng Tee and Marcelo H. Ang
items.authorsShort: J. Sun, J. Li, T. Liu, C. Yuan, S. Sun, et al.
items.summary: Robust motion prediction for partially observable scenarios, reflecting the continued systems and autonomy thread in the research portfolio.

items.title: DriveSceneGen: Generating Diverse and Realistic Driving Scenarios From Scratch
items.authors: Shuo Sun and Zekai Gu and Tianchen Sun and Jiawei Sun and Chengran Yuan and Yuhang Han and Dongen Li and Marcelo H. Ang Jr.
items.authorsShort: S. Sun, Z. Gu, T. Sun, J. Sun, C. Yuan, et al.
items.summary: A generative simulation paper that broadens the portfolio beyond planning into the creation of diverse and realistic scenarios for autonomy development.

items.title: FISS+: Efficient and Focused Trajectory Generation and Refinement using Fast Iterative Search and Sampling Strategy
items.authors: Shuo Sun and Jie Chen and Jiawei Sun and Chengran Yuan and Yuanchen Li and Tangyike Zhang and Marcelo H. Ang
items.authorsShort: S. Sun, J. Chen, J. Sun, C. Yuan, Y. Li, et al.
items.summary: A coarse-to-fine planning framework that reinforces the technical foundation of efficient real-time trajectory generation.

items.title: Maximum Entropy Inverse Reinforcement Learning Based on Frenet Frame Sampling for Human-like Autonomous Driving
items.authors: Tangyike Zhang and Shuo Sun and Jiamin Shi and Shitao Chen and Marcelo H. Ang and Jingmin Xin and Nanning Zheng
items.authorsShort: T. Zhang, S. Sun, J. Shi, S. Chen, M. H. Ang, et al.
items.summary: A planning-oriented study on learning reward functions that reflect human driving tendencies in multi-lane scenarios.

items.title: Autonomous Research Platform for Cleaning Operations in Mixed Indoor & Outdoor Environments
items.authors: Shuo Sun and Tangyike Zhang and Zhihai Xiang and Yuhang Han and Dongen Li and Jianghao Li and Zhiyang Liu and Marcelo H. Ang
items.authorsShort: S. Sun, T. Zhang, Z. Xiang, Y. Han, D. Li, et al.
items.summary: A systems paper focused on an autonomous cleaning platform deployed across varied real-world environments.

items.title: FISS: A Trajectory Planning Framework Using Fast Iterative Search and Sampling Strategy for Autonomous Driving
items.authors: Shuo Sun and Zhiyang Liu and Huan Yin and Marcelo H. Ang
items.authorsShort: S. Sun, Z. Liu, H. Yin, M. H. Ang
items.summary: A core planning paper in the portfolio, showing the algorithmic groundwork behind later systems and simulation work.
